title: Chapter 2: The Room That Broke
summary: A longer Chapter 2 route for players who finished Chapter 1 on the Rebellion Path. Mira has broken protocol in public, Soren has made Lattice improvise, and the city starts punishing people for memories they have not had yet.
designNotes: Target 15 to 20 minutes for a first playthrough.
Carry forward rebellion, magicEntropy, and child-memory flags from Chapter 1.
Use prior choices to decide whether the child becomes a protected witness, a liability, or a symbol.
Cache this pack only when the player has earned rebellion-path and is approaching Chapter 2.
